name: 72"x14" Striped Table Runner - Room Essentials™
description:
This Striped Table Runner from Threshold™ effortlessly brings timeless, cheery vibes to your table setup. The rectangular table runner is adorned with a multicolor striped print in peach, white, yellow, blue and orange, accented with white scalloped-detailed edging for a lovely look. The 100% cotton construction helps protect your table from accidental spills and can be machine-washed for easy care. Pair it with coordinating napkins and placemats to create a seamless, chic dining setting.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
